creator: demon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, 
sorry for delay with response :) 

It seems that these logos are included into the recent nagios distribution. 
So I think that nagios-base-logos port is now obsolete. 

And I ask you to submit your enchancements to the authors of nagios, 
since this improvement is not FreeBSD-specific. 

Thanks!
